body.title: Seed PROC_SPRINT_CONTEXT — Igor understands sprint/ticket workflow vocabulary
body.result: seeded via claudecode/seed_process_habits.py — PROC_SPRINT_CONTEXT context_inject habit, full ticket/worker/sprint vocabulary
body.description: Seed a cognitive/context_inject habit PROC_SPRINT_CONTEXT triggered by sprint/ticket/queue discussion. Igor knows: queue lives at ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/queue.json, ticket lifecycle (pending/in_progress/done/blocked), worker daemon polls queue and spawns claude /sprint per ticket, /sprint skill = claim+work+post result+write done flag. Igor can discuss ticket status, suggest sizing, and understand when work is autonomous vs needs human touchpoint.
